
### heap overflow exercise  {.smaller}


```
void operator delete(void *p) {
    ...
    block_after->prev->next = block_after->next;
    ...
}
...
class MyBuffer : public GenericMyBuffer {
public:
    virtual void store(const char *p) override {
        strcpy(buffer, p);
    }
private:
    char buffer[64];
};
...
    GenericMyBuffer *a = new MyBuffer;
    ...
    a->store(attacker_controlled);
    ...
    delete a;
    ...

```
 ![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-subter-exer.figure-1.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}
![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-subter-exer.figure-2.svg){.absolute top="0%" left="0%" width=1050 height=600 .my-center  .fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}
